description:
Operating Area: Bahamas, Mediterranean

Get ready to be captivated by Provocateur, a yacht that underwent a complete interior/exterior refit in 2023/2024, resulting in a stunning transformation. This custom-built motor yacht, designed by Hot Lab Yachts & Design in 2016 and refitted by renowned designers Ozge Van and shipyard B&I, now boasts an extraordinary and modern outlook that sets it apart in the charter market.

With six en-suite rooms, including a main deck master cabin and exciting new features like a gym, sauna, and a bow swimming pool, Provocateur offers a contemporary luxury experience on the water.

Explore stunning destinations while enjoying moments of relaxation and fun in the enhanced beach club. With low engine hours and a 2023/2024 refit, Provocateur presents a unique opportunity to charter what feels like a brand new 165' superyacht.

crew.name: Ferdi Coetzer
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Ferdi Coetzer, an accomplished MCA Master with a wealth of experience, boasts a comprehensive array of certifications, including MCA Yacht Master Ocean, Cayman Islands Endorsement, and Personal Watercraft License (Instructor). With proficiency in vessel handling, navigation, and safety procedures, Ferdi has demonstrated exceptional leadership as a captain, overseeing the day-to day operations of multiple yachts. His track record includes successfully managing budgets, implementing safety protocols, and ensuring compliance with international
laws and regulations, all while delivering unforgettable experiences for owners and guests.

crew.name: John Kenhard
crew.bio:
Nationality: British

John Kenhard is the Rotational Captain of M/Y Provocateur, with extensive experience commanding yachts up to 3000 GT and overseeing new build projects. He holds an MCA Class 4 Master certification, ECDIS, SSO, ISM, and an Advanced Engine Course, among others. Over his 
distinguished career, John has captained vessels ranging from 50m to 82m, managing operations, crew, and owner requirements across private and charter yachts. Known for his professionalism, strong leadership, and technical expertise, he excels in delivering exceptional service while adhering to stringent safety standards.

crew.name: Ryan Van Niekerk
crew.bio:
Nationality: French / South African

 Ryan Van Niekerk, a Chief/Sole Engineer with a Chief Engineer 3000kw qualification and extensive experience in both mechanical/general large-scale engineering and the yachting industry. Fluent in English and possessing basic conversational ability in French, Ryan is skilled in 
mechanical operations, CNC machining, 3D technical design, and a range of other hands-on tasks, including welding, painting, and carpentry. With a calm nature and over 6 years of yachting industry experience, Ryan excels in troubleshooting and maintaining composure under 
pressure.

crew.name: Victor Kasko
crew.bio:
Nationality: Ukrainian

Victor Kasko, a skilled 1st/2nd Officer with extensive maritime qualifications including Master 500, OOW Unlimited, and European CoC. A passionate navigational officer with experience in managing bridge/deck positions, Victor brings strong knowledge of ISM, FFE & LSA management. With a background in private and charter yachts, including his recent role as 2nd Officer on a 92m vessel, Victor is well-versed in bridge routines, management, and worldwide navigation. Additionally, his expertise extends to handling tenders, ribs, jet skis, and diving operations.

crew.name: Valeriia Denysiuk
crew.bio:
Nationality: Ukrainian

Valeriia is the Chief Stewardess of M/Y Provocateur, bringing 8 years of yacht experience on both motor and sailing yachts. She is highly skilled in managing and leading interior teams, overseeing service, housekeeping, and guest relations for private and charter yachts. Fluent 
in English and Russian, Valeria holds an ENG1 Seafarers Medical Certificate, STCW with PSA/PDSD, Schengen and B1/B2 visas, as well as certifications in silver service, sommelier, and food safety hygiene. With a keen eye for detail, excellent leadership skills, and a client
oriented approach, she ensures seamless operations and exceptional guest satisfaction.

crew.name: Johnny Kanaan
crew.bio:
Nationality: Lebanses

Johnny Kanaan, a seasoned Chief Officer/Engineer, brings a wealth of maritime expertise to M/Y Provocateur. With a diverse skill set including watch-keeping, navigation, line handling, and manoeuvring various types of yachts, he is dedicated to ensuring the safety and efficiency of 
operations onboard. He has extensive experience in yacht deliveries, maintenance, and guest services, combined with fluency in English and French.

crew.name: Lynne-Marie Van AS
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Lynne-Marie is the Second Stewardess of M/Y Provocateur, with a solid background in both yachting and shore based hospitality. She has extensive experience managing interior operations on yachts ranging from 35m to 139m, overseeing housekeeping, guest service, and inventory management. Holding key certifications such as STCW, ENG1, PSA, PDSD, and a Level 2 Food Hygiene and Safety, she is skilled in all areas of service and housekeeping, including flower arrangement, table decorating, and bartending. Lynne-Marie is known for her strong work ethic, attention to detail, and excellent team management abilities.

crew.name: Zane Ford
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Zane is an experienced engineer and deckhand with a diverse background in electrical and mechanical engineering, as well as audio technology. He has worked on various vessels, performing tasks such as engine room detailing, maintenance, and repairs, and holds qualifications including STCW '10 and an ENG 1 certificate. Zane's expertise in automated control systems, electrical automation, and fault finding make him a valuable addition to the crew of M/Y Provocateur.

crew.name: William Deguara
crew.bio:
Nationality: French

William is a French Chef who is passionate about food and cooking since his youngest age. In 2018 William has obtained a professional French baccalaureate degree in culinary arts before to continue his studies at the famous Paul Bocuse institute. His yachting career start in 2022 
after many working experiences in famous Michelin stars restaurants. This enthusiastic and motivated Chef is also passionate by water sports and football. Languages: 
French, English, Spanish.

crew.name: Monika Blonka
crew.bio:
Nationality: Polish/British

Monika Blonka, currently the Third Stewardess/ Masseuse aboard M/Y Provocateur, holds comprehensive qualifications including STCW 2023, RYA Powerboat Level 2, and a Holistic Body Massage Diploma. With a robust background in personal training, hospitality, and housekeeping, she is adept at promoting guest well-being and delivering exceptional service. Monika is fluent in English and Polish.

crew.name: Cara Weyers
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Cara is the 4th Stewardess on M/Y Provocateur, bringing strong skills in service, housekeeping, and guest interaction. She holds key certifications including STCW'10, PDSD, MCA Food Safety & Hygiene Level 2, and ENG1 Medical, and has experience in silver service, wine knowledge, and interior styling. Fluent in English and Afrikaans, with a basic understanding of German, Cara 
is adaptable and guest-focused in a fast-paced yachting environment. Her vibrant personality and attention to detail make her an asset to the crew.

crew.name: Francois Theunissen
crew.bio:
Nationality: South African

Francois Theunissen is the Deckhand/Second Engineer on M/Y Provocateur, bringing a wealth of experience in both deck and engineering roles. He holds key qualifications such as AEC1 & 2, STCW 95, ENG1, and a Day Skipper certificate, along with specialized training in diesel engines, 
radar operations, and powerboat handling. With a strong background in engine maintenance, tender operations, and deck duties, Francois is skilled in both technical and hands on tasks, including electrical work, plumbing, and safety procedures.
